instruction:
Compute the integral:
$$
\int \frac{ 2 \cdot x-1 }{ \sqrt{8 \cdot x^2+4 \cdot x-10} } \, dx
$$

Options:
A. frac{1}{32\cdot\sqrt{2}}\cdot\left(16\cdot\sqrt{4\cdot x^2+2\cdot x-5}-24\cdot\ln\left(\left|2+4\cdot\sqrt{4\cdot x^2+2\cdot x-5}+11\cdot x\right|\right)\right)+C
